"use strict";
/**
 * ResHandle — 资源句柄（Handle Pattern）
 *
 * 职责：持有单次加载或实例化操作的结果，并在 release() 时通过
 * IResController 接口将卸载逻辑委托给系统执行。
 *
 * 依赖倒置：ResHandle 仅依赖 IResController 接口而非 ResSystem 具体类，
 * 消除循环依赖风险，且便于单元测试时注入 Mock 实现。
 */
Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
exports.ResHandle = void 0;
// ─── 句柄实现 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
class ResHandle {
    _controller;
    _kind;
    key;
    loadType;
    _released = false;
    _asset;
    constructor(_controller, _kind, key, loadType, asset) {
        this._controller = _controller;
        this._kind = _kind;
        this.key = key;
        this.loadType = loadType;
        this._asset = asset;
    }
    get asset() { return this._asset; }
    get isLoaded() { return this._asset !== null && !this._released; }
    get isReleased() { return this._released; }
    release() {
        if (this._released)
            return;
        this._released = true;
        const asset = this._asset;
        this._asset = null;
        if (this._kind === "instance") {
            this._controller.onInstanceHandleRelease(asset);
        }
        else {
            this._controller.onAssetHandleRelease(this.key, this.loadType);
        }
    }
}
exports.ResHandle = ResHandle;
//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
